author: Wei Ting Y.

title: Genuine 30-second application by day 3
body: Sister-in-law tried mine and bought her own within the week. Survived a 6-hour bharatanatyam recital, the makeup melted before the lashes did. Removal is gentle enough that I don't lose any of my natural lashes. Worth every cent and then some.
author: Deepa M.

title: First magnetic lash that actually fits
body: Saw VIP Access on a friend and had to ask what brand. Sits flush even on my deep-set eyes. Big plus. No glue means no panda eyes at the end of the day. Already ordered a backup pair.
author: Crystal Yap

title: Survived my akad
body: Kakak ipar bagi sebagai birthday gift, terus jatuh cinta. Suami pun puji cantik, dia rare nak comment pasal makeup. First time I stuck them on upside down, lol. Lesson learned. Berbaloi-baloi.
author: Eka M.

title: Light, comfy, easy
body: Sis, this is the lazy-girl lash, period. Travel with the case, sekali pun tak rosak. Liner dia draw smooth, tak skip-skip macam yang lain. Stop scrolling and just buy lah.
author: Aina Bakar

title: Compliments every time
body: I always thought magnetic was a gimmick. Officially wrong. Easier to remove than to apply. Just lift off, no residue. Photographs beautifully. My ring light selfies look like studio shots. Took practice. Day 1 was rough but I figured it out by day 3. Will be repurchasing the moment my pair gives out.
author: Si Min Tan

title: Sits flat, looks natural
body: Office crush noticed my eyes. Worth every ringgit alone. Pairs perfectly with a winged liner if you're already used to drawing one. The magnets do most of the work, you just hold the band close and they snap into place. 100% buying again.
author: Hui

title: Sits flat, looks natural
body: Saya amat berpuas hati dengan VIP Access. Tidak meninggalkan sebarang kesan apabila ditanggalkan, tidak seperti gam yang sering merosakkan bulu mata. Saya mengesyorkan produk ini kepada rakan-rakan saya, terutamanya yang baru ingin mencuba bulu mata magnetik. Pasti akan membeli semula.
author: Nurul Z.

title: Mixed feelings
body: Honest review: needed practice. The outer corner needs an extra press, otherwise it'll lift. The magnets do most of the work, you just hold the band close and they snap into place. The first application took me 10 minutes. Now I do it in 30 seconds. Stick with it through the first week and it pays off.
author: Sze Wei C.

title: My new favourite
body: 比之前用的胶水睫毛好太多了。 戴起来很轻，几乎感觉不到。 Local brand 加油！
author: Crystal N.

title: Day 1 was rough, day 7 was magic
body: Honestly thought I'd made a mistake the first night. Day 4 I was a believer. I genuinely don't remember the last time I used mascara. That's the level of life-changing. The video tutorial saved me. Watch it BEFORE your first attempt, not after. Three days of patience for a lifetime of effortless lashes. Take the trade.
author: Maisarah A.

title: Stick with it
body: Watched the demo video three times before I got it. Worth the patience. Three days of slight struggle, six months of effortless wear. Worth the trade. Three days of patience for a lifetime of effortless lashes. Take the trade.
author: @sharon_pj

title: Glasses-friendly
body: Beli VIP Access ikut review IG, sumpah tak menyesal. Pakai 3 hari berturut-turut, masih cantik macam baru. Akak pun nak beli lagi sepasang.
author: Nor Zainal

title: Worth it
body: Worth the hype.
author: Nadia A.

title: Easy after the first try
body: 妈妈试过我的，现在她也要买。 Removed 容易，no residue。 强烈推荐！
author: Michelle S.

title: Not for me
body: Not for me.
author: S. Pillai

title: Almost gave up — glad I didn't
body: Be patient with the first few wears. It clicks suddenly, then it's effortless. Wish someone told me the first time would feel awkward — it gets so much faster. The breakthrough happens when you stop thinking and just trust the magnet click. Push through day 1 and you're set for life.
author: Wani R.

title: Sold
body: Genuinely so good.
author: Rachel C.

title: Easier than mascara
body: 包装精美，质量也很好。 适合 monolid 的款式，band sit flush。 Stop scrolling 直接 buy。
author: Hui Min Heng

title: Bought it for Raya, kept wearing it after
body: Suka sangat dengan VIP Access, ringan dan natural. Bila orang puji baru perasan tu sebab Santai. Hubby pun tak perasan, ingat saya pergi salon. Yes yes yes, beli je.
author: Izzati

title: First magnetic lash that actually fits
body: Mak suruh beli yang murah dulu, ended up buying two pairs of these instead. Recommended for office girlies who always rush in the morning. First time I stuck them on upside down, lol. Lesson learned. Will get another pair next month.
author: Mira R.

title: Easy after the first try
body: The packaging alone is worth a photo. Customer service responded within an hour when I had a question. Highly recommend, especially for first-timers.
author: Ling B.

title: Sits flat, looks natural
body: Bought VIP Access for my engagement weekend. Fits beautifully under my horn-rimmed glasses, no lens touching. Photographer at my engagement asked which extensions I was wearing. Bought one for my mom's birthday next month.
author: Saraswati

title: No notes
body: Hooked.
author: Jasmine Yeo

title: Glasses-friendly
body: 终于一对磁性睫毛 sit flush 在我的眼皮上。 Cousin asked which brand, told her Santai, she ordered same night. Saved me so much morning time, no joke.
author: Sharon S.

body: Disyorkan.
author: @fatin_pj

title: Genuine 30-second application by day 3
body: Bestie 介绍的，现在我也介绍给我的朋友们。 磁吸力够强，戴一整天都不会掉。 推荐给所有 Chinese girls。
author: Si Min Cheong

title: My new daily
body: Already repurchased.
author: Michelle S.

title: Survived a 12-hour shift
body: Akhirnya jumpa magnetic lashes yang fit my mata. Tak gugur walaupun sambil masak dan menangis tengok cerekarama. Magnetic liner ran out faster than I'd like — wish there was a refill. Bagi 100 stars boleh tak?
author: Aina

title: Compliments every time
body: Tengok TikTok girls semua pakai, akhirnya beli sendiri. Hari-hari pakai pergi office, sampai weekend pun pakai. Hubby pun tak perasan, ingat saya pergi salon. Cuba lah, tak rugi.
author: Iman

title: Recommended
body: Love it.
author: Sangeetha

title: Worth the hype
body: My makeup routine just got 8 minutes shorter. Has the right balance — not too natural, not too dramatic. Skip the strip lashes, go straight to these.
author: Xin Yi T.

title: Good but practice needed
body: Last week pergi Bangsar event, semua orang tanya which lashes. Cantik dia, very flattering for my mata sepet. Will rep this brand sampai bila-bila.
author: Sangeetha Raj

title: Best lah
body: 10/10 quality.
author: Vimala R.
